name: Eilidh MacFhionnlaigh
summary: Accomplished NLP Research Engineer with over 8 years of experience in developing large-scale language models and semantic search architectures. Proven track record of deploying production-grade transformer models to solve complex linguistic challenges in multilingual environments.

experience.title: Senior NLP Research Engineer
experience.description: Lead the development of proprietary LLMs for specialized domain adaptation, resulting in a 30% improvement in inference efficiency. Mentored junior researchers and oversaw the transition of research prototypes into scalable cloud infrastructure.

experience.title: NLP Engineer
experience.description: Designed and implemented custom tokenization pipelines and attention-based architectures for sentiment analysis. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate NLP features into core customer-facing products.

experience.title: Junior Data Scientist
experience.description: Focused on statistical modeling and initial text classification tasks using traditional machine learning libraries. Assisted in the migration of legacy data processing scripts to modern Python-based workflows.
